visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A large, off-white bear mascot statue with a simple black-inked smile and eyes stands prominently at a store entrance. The background features bright yellow walls and blue accents, characteristic of a retail space. Lighting is bright and even. (2) Exterior shots of the shop show a glass storefront with the '168cm' logo and various informational stickers on the glass door. The environment is a clean, modern urban street. (3) Inside, the camera pans across long, brightly lit yellow shelves filled with hundreds of packaged phone cases in diverse designs. The layout is organized and vibrant. (4) Close-up views highlight specific phone accessories including floral-patterned cases, a Magsafe grip, and beaded wrist straps. The items are laid out on yellow trays for display. (5) The tour continues to other sections featuring Apple Watch bands, plush toys of the bear mascot, and stationery like stickers and cards. (6) A digital self-checkout kiosk with a touch screen is shown, followed by a 'Photo Box' wooden station for customer photos. (7) The final shot is a screen capture of a map application showing the '168cm Myeongdong' location in South Korea.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 明洞手機殼商店考察. [Variety]: Hi. (2) [Logo]: 168cm.kr. [Slogan]: 代購大熱門的 168cm. [Subtitle]: 進化成了無人商店. (3) [Subtitle]: 黃色店外觀很顯眼非常好找. (4) [Subtitle]: 一進門整面的手機殼牆. (5) [Subtitle]: 蘋果、三星各型號都有. (6) [Subtitle]: 但大宗的還是 iPhone 啦. (7) [Subtitle]: 挑好還可以試裝感受一下質感. (8) [Subtitle]: 韓妞選手機殼 SOP. (9) [Subtitle]: 先挑一個喜歡的款式. (10) [Subtitle]: 挑一個可以搭配的 MagSafe 的支架. (11) [Subtitle]: 還有卡夾. (12) [Subtitle]: 最後也不忘記有掛繩. (13) [Subtitle]: 整套配起來大家都是歐爸歐膩. (14) [Subtitle]: 這邊除了手機殼也有手錶、耳機的配件. (15) [Subtitle]: 完全可以選好搭一套. (16) [Subtitle]: 還有一些聯名的周邊可以買. (17) [Subtitle]: 也有我最喜歡的... (18) [Subtitle]: 大家也知道是誰了吧? (19) [Subtitle]: 完全就是想要騙走我的錢. (20) [Subtitle]: 不會韓文一樣輕鬆購. (21) [Logo]: 168cm 明洞店.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: The narrator's body is not visible; only a few distant passers-by appear in the reflection and outdoor background near the end.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A trendy retail store with a consistent yellow and blue color scheme, featuring orderly shelves of phone accessories and a giant mascot statue. The outdoor scene shows a typical clean South Korean commercial street.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male narrator with a bright, energetic voice begins speaking over an upbeat acoustic guitar-driven pop track. The speech rate is brisk and engaging. (2) As the narrator describes the store's interior, high-frequency 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects punctuate visual transitions or key points. The music maintains a steady, rhythmic major-key progression. (3) The vocal delivery remains consistently high-arousal and cheerful as the speaker goes through the shopping 'SOP'. (4) Towards the end, the music swells slightly as he makes a joke about his money being 'stolen' by the cute items, before concluding with a final friendly remark. The overall audio mix is clean with professional clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Step-by-step tour -> Additional items -> Call to action/Location
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and promote the '168cm' unmanned phone accessory store in Myeongdong, Seoul, highlighting its cute mascot, wide variety of designs, and easy self-service shopping experience for tourists.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing a specific retail brand and its products in a positive, promotional light.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a classic 'travel discovery' format typical of social media vlogs, using fast editing and high-energy narration to appeal to young consumers.
